creator: lehmann@ans-netz.de
text:
Hi,

have you tried recompiling openal? There is no error in freealut itself
because the mentioned functions are not used, but I guess something
during the openal librar< linking gets wrong - maybe some MMX support
detection?

-- 
 Oliver Lehmann
